texto: I have been doing a lot of romantic movies, so such roles don't excite me much now. I would like to play an out-and-out, really cruel villain once. My character in 'Da Thadiya' had such a streak, but I want a full length villainous role. It is a different kind of excitement.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Nivin Pauly: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I have been doing a lot of romantic movies, so such roles don't excite me much now. I would like …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, character, me pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de me e want.

frase_original: I have been doing a lot of romantic movies, so such roles don't excite me much now. I would like to play an out-and-out, really cruel villain once. My character in 'Da Thadiya' had such a streak, but I want a full length villainous role. It is a different kind of excitement.

texto: As a youngster, when I was active in church, I had a lot of fun choosing and hanging massive stars and making the cribs. I was also very involved in the Christmas plays, though not as an actor, but I took joy in setting up the props.
explicacao: Citação de Nivin Pauly sobre temas ligados a felicidade. “As a youngster, when I was active in church, I had a lot of fun choosing and hanging massive star…” articula felicidade, stars, joy em registro de felicidade, com relevância para contextos como natal e joy.

frase_original: As a youngster, when I was active in church, I had a lot of fun choosing and hanging massive stars and making the cribs. I was also very involved in the Christmas plays, though not as an actor, but I took joy in setting up the props.

texto: I don't want to adhere to any particular image. I have tried to bring in variety to my characters. But then, only a few actors have managed to earn this tag of a romantic hero. Many have aspired to get such a label. So I am not complaining.
explicacao: Citação de Nivin Pauly sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I don't want to adhere to any particular image. I have tried to bring in variety to my characters…” articula reflexao, hero, i-am em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como i-am e want.

frase_original: I don't want to adhere to any particular image. I have tried to bring in variety to my characters. But then, only a few actors have managed to earn this tag of a romantic hero. Many have aspired to get such a label. So I am not complaining.
